---
title: WikiLinks
---

# WikiLinks

A bare relative link [[another.mdx]] and a nested one [[sub/dir/page.mdx]].

An explicit label: [[My Favorite Link|target.mdx]].

An absolute target [[/app/docs/absolute/link.mdx]] taken verbatim.

Two on one line: [[a.mdx]] and [[b.mdx]].

A wiki-link inside **[[bold.mdx]]** phrasing.

| Column | Link |
| - | - |
| row | [[label\|celltarget.mdx]] |

An ordinary [markdown link](https://example.com) is untouched, and `[[code]]` in
an inline code span stays literal.
